caption: A man sits at a dark table in a studio, wearing a white baseball cap, large over-ear headphones, and a black hoodie with "BOSS" printed in gold lettering. He has a gold chain around his neck and a gold watch on his left wrist. A professional microphone on a boom arm is positioned in front of him, and a black mug sits on the table to his right. The background features white banners with gold stars and the text "UNICORN HUSTLE," alongside a blue sign that reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". A small logo in the bottom left corner says "THE TALK OUT LOUD PODCAST." As the scene progresses, the man is seen speaking, his mouth moving and his facial expression shifting slightly while he keeps his hands clasped on the table. The camera remains stationary, capturing his upper body and the studio equipment throughout the sequence.
